Feedback? Ideas? Complaints? Suggestions? Request for report about other area? send me a message!
This page was generated using data obtained on 2022-11-26. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q17059156 vs Q16723536
Yathong Nature Reserve - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q24089721 vs Q4216004
The Star - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(5987256)['wikidata'='Q17059156']['wikipedia'='en:Yathong Nature Reserve']; way(16597926)['wikidata'='Q24089721']['wikipedia'='en:The Star, Sydney']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']

malformed species:wikidata tag (norfolk pine)
an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(10106536093)['operator:wikidata'='#']; node(8401097494)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; node(8401097495)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; node(8401097496)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; node(8401097497)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; node(8401097498)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; node(8401097499)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; node(8401097500)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; node(8401097501)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; node(8401097502)['species:wikidata'='norfolk pine']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['malformed secondary wikidata tag']


should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking to a vehicle model or class
linked wikidata entry (Q7396346) is about a vehicle model or class, so it is very unlikely to be correct
subject:wikipedia=* or model:wikipedia tag would be probably better (see https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:wikipedia#Secondary_Wikipedia_links for full list of what else may be applicable)
in case of change remember to remove wikidata tag if it is present
object categorised by Wikidata - wrong classification may be caused by wrong data on Wikidata
Tweed Valley Sailing Club - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(8341436648)['wikidata'='Q7396346']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['should use a secondary wikipedia tag - linking to a vehicle model or class']

Other useful resources

JOSM Wikipedia plugin
